# Step 03: Generate — Create Config File

## Purpose

Generate `.cc-to-codex.yaml` from the user's selections.

## Config Schema

```yaml
# .cc-to-codex.yaml
# Generated by cc-to-codex-config skill

scope: global  # "global" or "project"

# Project paths (only when scope == project)
project:
  claude_dir: /path/to/.claude
  codex_dir: /path/to/.codex

exclude:
  # Skill directories to skip (glob patterns supported)
  skills:
    - wf
    - poppy-*

  # Hook files to skip (matched against command string)
  hooks:
    - rtk-rewrite.sh
    - record-surface-session.sh

  # CLAUDE.md sections/references to omit from AGENTS.md
  claude_md_sections:
    - "@RTK.md"
    - "Sub-Agent Policy"
```

## Procedure

1. Build the YAML from collected selections
2. Determine save location:
   ```
   Config 파일을 어디에 저장할까요?

   1. ~/.cc-to-codex.yaml (글로벌, 기본값)
   2. ./.cc-to-codex.yaml (프로젝트 루트)
   ```
3. Write the file
4. Show the generated content to the user

## Checklist

- [ ] Build YAML from selections
- [ ] Ask save location
- [ ] Write config file
- [ ] Display generated config to user
